$comment: telemetry.v1 — FROZEN 2026-07-09. Schema for the body of POST https://admin.windyword.ai/v1/events (per-emitter bearer token). Field names match the LIVE ingest as probed in docs/PROBE_RESULTS.md (the ingest's required trio is service/event_type/actor_type; the genome's earlier sketch's 'event' field is event_type here). CONTENT-FREE BY CONSTRUCTION: additionalProperties:false everywhere and no free-text fields — ids, enums, timestamps, and numbers only. A payload carrying 'transcript', 'message', or any other unlisted key is schema-invalid (the live ingest 422s the same way). Emitted fire-and-forget by telemetry/emit.py (ADR-WA-001): async, ≤200ms, swallows all errors, no-op unless configured. Change control per contracts/README.md.
title: Windy Talk telemetry event batch

event_type.$comment: Dotted event names, not free text. The v1 vocabulary; additive growth via v1.1.

model.$comment: Model id via Mind — an identifier, never output text.

latency_ms.$comment: The §0.1 gates, measured per voice-session.v1 §8. Numbers only.

tool.$comment: hands.mcp.v1 tool name for tool.invoked events — the name only, never args.

error_code.$comment: A code (e.g. voice-session.v1 §9 codes), never a message string.

region.$comment: Coarse only (country/region code) — granularity is a Grant privacy call (ADR-058 D10).
